transcript:
Alice: Sprint retro. What went well?
Bob: We shipped the auth migration ahead of schedule.
Carol: Daily standups felt tighter — fifteen minutes flat.
Alice: What didn't go well?
Dave: Too many last-minute scope additions from product.
Carol: And the staging environment was down twice.
Alice: Actions for next sprint?
Dave: I'll set up a Friday cutoff for scope changes.
Bob: I'll automate staging health checks so we catch issues earlier.
Alice: Decision: we'll lock scope every Friday from now on.
